prompt: Create a full-body lifestyle fashion photograph of a stylish young woman confidently walking across a modern European city crosswalk, centered in frame, shot at street level with a natural candid editorial feel. She wears a fitted short black sleeveless bodycon mini dress layered under an oversized open white button-down shirt with rolled sleeves and fabric flowing naturally as she walks. Add clean white chunky sneakers, a delicate gold necklace, subtle earrings, and a small structured black leather top-handle handbag with a gold logo held in one hand. Her long dark wavy hair is swept back by movement, posture relaxed and confident, one leg stepping forward. Set the scene in Paris-style stone building street with a cafe awning reading SAINT SEVERIN CAFE, with zebra crossing stripes in the foreground, classic beige architecture, black iron balconies, cafe chairs, a chalkboard menu, traffic lights, and softly blurred pedestrians in the background. Use warm late-afternoon natural light, realistic shadows, shallow depth of field, high-end street style photography, sharp clothing detail, realistic skin tones, vertical 2:3 composition, no watermark, no extra text besides the cafe sign.
